click_target_label: Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which candidate label marks the target control?
Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which labeled web control matches the guide code and page context?
Use the guide code and page context for this instruction: {instruction_text}. What candidate label marks the target?
Find the control implied by this guide-code instruction: {instruction_text}. Which label is shown?
Choose the candidate label for this guided click target: {instruction_text}.
type_field_label: Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which candidate label marks the target input?
Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which labeled input field matches the guide code and page context?
Use the guide code and page context for this instruction: {instruction_text}. What candidate label marks the input?
Find the input implied by this guide-code instruction: {instruction_text}. Which label is shown?
Choose the candidate label for this guided text-entry target: {instruction_text}.
select_option_label: Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which candidate label marks the target option?
Instruction: {instruction_text}. Which labeled option matches the guide code and page context?
Use the guide code and page context for this instruction: {instruction_text}. What candidate label marks the option?
Find the option implied by this guide-code instruction: {instruction_text}. Which label is shown?
Choose the candidate label for this guided selection target: {instruction_text}.
click_guide_code_target_count: How many candidate controls use guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count the candidate web controls marked with guide code "{guide_code}".
What is the number of candidate controls that show guide code "{guide_code}"?
How many labeled controls match guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count all visible candidate controls using guide code "{guide_code}".
type_field_guide_code_target_count: How many candidate inputs use guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count the candidate input fields marked with guide code "{guide_code}".
What is the number of candidate inputs that show guide code "{guide_code}"?
How many labeled inputs match guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count all visible candidate inputs using guide code "{guide_code}".
select_option_guide_code_target_count: How many candidate options use guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count the candidate option controls marked with guide code "{guide_code}".
What is the number of candidate options that show guide code "{guide_code}"?
How many labeled options match guide code "{guide_code}"?
Count all visible candidate options using guide code "{guide_code}".

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:web_action.object_description: a browser page with an action instruction banner, a visible guide-code table, and candidate markers on targetable web controls

query:click_target_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate label as a single capital letter
query:click_target_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the target button and its candidate label marker

query:type_field_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate label as a single capital letter
query:type_field_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the target input and its candidate label marker

query:select_option_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate label as a single capital letter
query:select_option_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around the target option and its candidate label marker

query:click_guide_code_target_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of matching candidate controls
query:click_guide_code_target_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel boxes around every candidate control that matches the requested guide code

query:type_field_guide_code_target_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of matching candidate inputs
query:type_field_guide_code_target_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel boxes around every candidate input that matches the requested guide code

query:select_option_guide_code_target_co.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of matching candidate options
query:select_option_guide_code_target_co.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel boxes around every candidate option that matches the requested guide code
